sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَحْسَنَ النَّاسِ خُلُقًا وَتَعَامُلًا.
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je bio najljepšeg morala i ophodnje među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) was the best of people in character and dealings.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّ اللهَ رَفِيقٌ يُحِبُّ الرِّفْقَ» [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Zaista je Allah blag i voli blagost" [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o dobročinstvu i održavanju veza].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: "Indeed, Allah is Kind and loves kindness" [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Virtue and Joining Ties].

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَتَعَامَلُ مَعَ الصِّغَارِ وَالْكِبَارِ بِرَحْمَةٍ وَصَبْرٍ عَظِيمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ophodio se prema mlađima i starijima s milošću i velikim strpljenjem.
sentences.translationEn: He used to deal with the young and the old with mercy and great patience.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَتَعَلَّمُ مِنْ سِيرَتِهِ الْعَطِرَةِ كَيْفَ نَكُونُ رُحَمَاءَ مَعَ جَمِيعِ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Iz njegove mirisne sire učimo kako da budemo milostivi prema svim ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: We learn from his fragrant biography how to be merciful to all people.

sentences.arabic: الِاقْتِدَاءُ بِالرَّسُولِ هُوَ طَرِيقُ النَّجَاحِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Slijeđenje Poslanika je put uspjeha na dunjaluku i ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: Following the example of the Messenger is the path to success in this world and the Hereafter.
